haiku:
Chewy, sweet delight,
Colors swirl like rainbows bright,
Joy wrapped in each bite.
Happy #NationalTaffyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Copper shines like sun,
Children toss their wishes high,
Joy springs from the ground.
Happy #LuckyPennyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful laughter rings,
Cake blooms with icing petals,
Bright wishes take flight.
#HappyBirthdayMargaretFuller from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver light spills down,
Casting shadows on soft grass,
Whispers of the night.
Happy #FirstQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
